name: Track the Animal
description: Use track shape, trail direction, and nearby habitat clues to identify which desert animal passed through.

steps.description: Find animal tracks in sandy ground.
Follow the tracks to an animal or animal sign without disturbing it.
Identify which animal made the tracks using size, toes, and habitat clues.
Report the track evidence to Ranger Nita.

success_dialogue: Excellent tracking. You followed evidence instead of chasing the animal, which keeps both scientist and wildlife safe.
reward_text: You earned 30 ZuzuBucks, 7 reputation, and the Wildlife Tracker badge.
